baseball_game.scene: Children's cartoon image of a packed, vibrant baseball stadium, 16:9 panoramic landscape. A dense, cheering crowd of fans fills the stands across the entire image, holding hot dogs, pink cotton candy, popcorn tubs, megaphones, and coffee cups, with blue and white pennants waving above them. In the foreground, a detailed wooden dugout contains scattered baseball bats, gloves, blue batting helmets, and open bags of sunflower seeds. On the green field, baseball players in pinstripe jerseys are in action. In the outfield, a large green manual scoreboard sits between sections of the crowd, displaying SEA vs CHC with innings 1-5 filled in and columns for R, H, and E. The top of the scene shows a bright blue sky with a few fluffy white clouds. Vibrant colors, flat design, thick black outlines, no small text.

beach.scene: Children's cartoon image of a big busy sunny beach. Sandy shore packed with colorful beach towels, beach chairs, striped beach umbrellas, sandcastles, and sand pails. Beach balls scattered across the sand, turtles and seashells near the water's edge. Rolling ocean waves with sailboats in the distance. Sunny sky filled with birds flying overhead. Wide panoramic (2:1). Bright colors, flat design, thick outlines, no text.

beauty_salon.scene: Children's book illustration of a large, busy beauty salon packed with things to find. A front reception counter on one side has a cash register, a tip jar, and a small goldfish bowl. Behind the counter, wall shelves hold colorful bottles of shampoo and hair dye with gaps between them and a round wall clock above. In the middle of the salon are two hair styling stations — tall chairs facing large oval mirrors with cluttered tables holding scissors, combs, brushes, clips, curling irons, and hair dryers; one chair is shaped like a bright red firetruck for kids. On the far side is a hair washing station with a reclined chair and a deep sink, and a nail station with a small table, bottles of nail polish, and a lamp. The scene is wide and panoramic (landscape orientation, roughly 2:1 ratio). Bright saturated colors, flat design, thick black outlines, no text. Every part of the scene is filled with interesting details — swept-up hair on the floor, a broom leaning in the corner, framed hairstyle posters on the walls, a spray bottle hanging from a hook, a trash can near the styling stations. Friendly and cheerful mood, suitable for children age 5–8.
